parsed_output.justification: Sean's early comment suggesting he knows who the werewolf is implies he may be the Minion, who identifies the Werewolf during the Night phase. Since the Drunk action (performed by Jacob) occurs after the Troublemaker action, Jacob would have swapped the Werewolf card into the center. Consequently, no player currently holds the Werewolf card.
